description: Gradle-accurate JVM classpath; fetch Java source, signatures, and class structure for agents.

cmd.description: Install the package via npx without a confirmation prompt.
cmd.name: -y

name: io.github.Sintexer/jvmsrc

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated absolute paths; only these project roots are allowed.
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_ALLOWED_ROOTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path for resolution and decompile caches (default: OS cache dir).
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_CACHE_ROOT

environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path for failure diagnostic logs.
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_LOG_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Max characters returned for full-file source (default 524288).
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_MAX_SOURCE_OUTPUT_CHARS

environmentVariables.description: Gradle resolution subprocess timeout in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_GRADLE_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a custom CFR JAR for decompilation.
environmentVariables.name: JVMSRC_CFR_PATH

packageArguments.description: Run the bundled MCP server (stdio transport).

runtimeArguments.description: Install the package via npx without a confirmation prompt.
runtimeArguments.name: -y

title: JVM Source Lens
